title: School Bus 校车
scene: 早晨同学们在校车站等校车。

lines.en: Amy, do you think the school bus will come on time today?
lines.zh: 艾米，你觉得今天校车会准时来吗？

lines.en: I hope so. Yesterday it was ten minutes late.
lines.zh: 希望如此。昨天晚了十分钟。

lines.en: Look! I can see the bus coming down the road!
lines.zh: 看！我看到校车从路上来了！

lines.en: Good morning, kids! Please line up and get on the bus.
lines.zh: 早上好，孩子们！请排好队上车。

lines.en: Good morning! Can I sit by the window, please?
lines.zh: 早上好！我可以坐在靠窗的位置吗？

lines.en: Sure! Find a seat and put on your seatbelt.
lines.zh: 当然！找个位子坐好，系上安全带。

lines.en: The bus is really full today. A lot of students!
lines.zh: 今天校车真满。好多学生！

lines.en: It's because it's Monday. Everyone is going to school.
lines.zh: 因为今天是星期一。大家都要去上学。

lines.en: Everyone seated? OK, let's go! Have a great day at school!
lines.zh: 都坐好了吗？好的，出发！祝你们在学校度过愉快的一天！

lines.en: Thank you! You too, Mr. Driver!
lines.zh: 谢谢您！您也是，司机叔叔！
